comment.body:
Just reread Alma's weekly post (was busy today) and I see that the downside pivot sits at 6930...which is interesting to me because today's SPX move puts an FVG below to 6857. A close down in that area and Alma's downside target should be realized. 

What's more interesting for me is if that type of downside move occurs this week or next, the current cycle period were in turns negative then. According to time cycle theory SPX/the market would eventually drop further towards the end of the cycle, which comes in the first half of March.

EW wave count also supports this type of move down.
